overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The player navigates through covered underpasses, urban intersections, elevated highways, and dense commercial areas with heavy holographic billboard presence.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass with graffiti walls

events.description: exits covered underpass with Tiger Claws graffiti into open city street with visible sky
transition from artificial tunnel lighting to mixed neon and street lighting

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle through covered corridors and emerging into open urban streets

notable_agents.action: distant car driving ahead on the road

entered.detail: red concrete wall with blue graffiti reading Tiger Claws and stylized tiger face
large illuminated advertisement with purple and white branding in tunnel
teal painted concrete walls lining the right side of the road
white steam rising from street level ventilation grate

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow covered underpass with red walls covered in Tiger Claws gang graffiti. The rider drives through a tunnel with illuminated Nicola billboards before emerging around 6 seconds into an open city street with visible steam vents and concrete barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection district with medical facilities

events.description: approaches and crosses yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk
slows behind a large Thornton truck stopped at intersection
accelerates past the truck and continues through green light

agents.ego_description: navigating city intersections, stopping behind traffic and accelerating through green lights

notable_agents.action: large black Thornton truck stopped at red light ahead of motorcycle
pedestrians standing on sidewalk near medical center entrance

entered.detail: large building with red cross symbol and illuminated medical signage
massive orange structural columns supporting overhead highway
black commercial truck with Thornton branding on tailgate
elevated walkway crossing above the street with glass sides

segments.scene_description: Driving through open city streets with visible sky and palm trees lining the sidewalks. The rider crosses a yellow striped crosswalk, approaches a medical center with red cross signage, and stops behind a Thornton truck at a traffic light before accelerating through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with heavy holographic advertising

events.description: enters covered walkway section with graffiti walls and overhead structure
exits covered area into open intersection with purple neon holograms visible
begins ascending ramp toward elevated highway section

agents.ego_description: weaving through moderate traffic while navigating toward highway entrance ramp

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving parallel on the right side

entered.detail: concrete wall with large blue graffiti reading NOX and other tags
large floating holographic advertisement with purple glow
red and white striped barriers blocking off construction zone
curved on-ramp leading to overhead expressway with blue neon edging

segments.scene_description: Navigating through a dense commercial area with heavy neon signage and graffiti-covered walls. The rider passes through a covered walkway section, emerges to see purple holographic advertisements, and begins ascending a highway ramp while weaving around other vehicles.

events.description: accelerates to high speed on elevated highway passing Sakura Street sign
enters covered tunnel section of the elevated highway
exits highway via off-ramp returning to street level

agents.ego_description: high-speed driving on elevated highway through covered and open sections

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead on the highway

entered.detail: illuminated overhead sign reading SAKURA ST 105 with yellow text
yellow and black striped safety barriers along road edge
enclosed tunnel portion of the elevated road with overhead lighting
sequential warning lights indicating curve in the road

segments.scene_description: High-speed traversal of an elevated expressway featuring the Sakura Street overhead sign. The rider passes through alternating open and covered sections of the highway, guided by yellow arrow warning lights, before taking the exit ramp back to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown commercial core with massive digital advertising

events.description: enters dense neon district with massive holographic billboards on all sides
navigates through intersection with checkered crosswalk pattern

agents.ego_description: cruising through the dense neon-lit downtown district surrounded by holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: silver car passing through intersection from the left

entered.detail: giant floating digital advertisements covering building facades with vivid colors
skyscrapers with illuminated windows and rooftop signage including Arasaka tower
rain-slicked road surface reflecting neon lights in multiple colors
ground level storefronts with bright neon signage in various colors

segments.scene_description: The final segment showcases the dense neon heart of Night City, with massive holographic billboards and corporate tower lights illuminating the wet reflective streets. The rider navigates through intersections surrounded by vivid digital advertising and ground-level neon shop signs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person ride that transitions from a claustrophobic urban underpass into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of the city. It begins within a narrow tunnel defined by red walls and gang graffiti, moving past illuminated billboards before emerging into an open street lined with steam vents and palm trees. As the rider crosses a yellow striped crosswalk and accelerates past a medical center, the scene shifts into a dense commercial district where the camera glides under covered walkways and past purple holographic advertisements. The perspective then ascends a highway ramp, weaving through traffic under the Sakura Street sign and alternating between open air and covered expressway sections before descending back to street level. Finally, the journey culminates in the city's glowing center, where the camera navigates wet, reflective intersections surrounded by massive corporate towers and vivid digital billboards.
